reasoning: The bullish case rests on three pillars: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (63¢ spread, price 22¢ above pivot), falling VIX (-1.53% tailwind), and flat overnight gap (open unbiased). These are SHORT-TERM momentum signals. However, the Internals agent identified a critical structural weakness that the three bullish agents DISMISSED too quickly: risk-off sector rotation. XLE +1.29% (energy outperforming, inflation-hedge signal), XLF -0.40% (financials weakness when bullish days see financial strength), XLK +0.18% (tech essentially flat). This is NARROW breadth—energy up alone while tech stalls and financials weaken is textbook defensive/stagflation rotation, NOT broad risk-on. The consensus treated this as 'no headwind,' but selective energy leadership without tech/financial follow-through is a warning flag. When SPY attempts to break the 713.14 battle level, it will lack institutional participation if this rotation persists. The ribbon + VIX are momentum, but momentum without breadth fails to extend past resistance. If XLK and XLF don't turn positive at open, the bullish narrative is structurally unsupported.

invalidation_scenarios.scenario: SPY holds 713.14 and reclaims it on first RTH test, AND XLK rallies > +0.8% by 09:45 ET, AND XLF turns positive (above -0.40%)
invalidation_scenarios.effect: Proves tech/financial strength is arriving at open, invalidating the 'narrow breadth / risk-off rotation' bearish signal. Broad institutional participation confirmed, bullish case wins.

invalidation_scenarios.scenario: SPY breaks 713.14 and rallies toward 715.63 Carry, but XLF remains below -0.40% through the RTH session and XLK fails to exceed +1.0%
invalidation_scenarios.effect: SPY rallied on ribbon + VIX momentum alone, but sector rotation never flipped back to broad risk-on. Upside extension fails because foundational (financial) support is missing. Proves bullish move is fragile and unsustainable.

invalidation_scenarios.scenario: VIX reverses and rallies > +5% intraday (back above 19.0 from 18.08), signaling fear returning
invalidation_scenarios.effect: The falling VIX was a key pillar of bullish macro support. If fear snaps back, premium re-expands and the 'VIX tailwind' evaporates. Ribbon + levels alone will struggle to hold SPY above 712.11 resistance. Proves macro backdrop flipped mid-session.

weakest_consensus_link: The bullish agents weighted ribbon structure + VIX as dominant signals and underweighted the Internals agent's sector breadth divergence. Risk-off rotation (energy outperforming, financials/tech stalling) suggests institutional appetite is rolling defensive, not confident in broad upside. Momentum (ribbon, VIX) without breadth typically fails at resistance.
key_observations: Sector rotation signal is REAL: XLE +1.29% (inflation hedge), XLF -0.40% (credit concerns), XLK +0.18% (growth absent) = defensive positioning, not risk-on backdrop
Narrow breadth (energy alone outperforming) is a CLASSIC stagflation warning, not a bullish signal—bullish days have BROAD participation across growth/financials
The three bullish agents focused on SHORT-TERM momentum (ribbon, VIX, levels) and missed the STRUCTURAL weakness (missing institutional support)
SPY's attempt to break 713.14 will likely FAIL if sector rotation persists—ribbon can get price to the level, but without XLK/XLF participation, upside extension stalls
Premarket Internals agent confidence 0.65 (bearish) is nearly equal to Technical 0.72 (bullish)—this is not a weak minority view, it is a competing structural signal
